name: CJ Dropshipping
description: CJ Dropshipping supplier catalog and fulfillment API. Search products, inspect variants, check stock, estimate shipping, and create dropshipping orders from CJ's product catalog.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: CJ Dropshipping access token. Generate it from your CJ developer API key using CJ's access-token endpoint, then paste the token here.

tools.name: categories_list
tools.description: List CJ product categories. Use before product search to discover category IDs.

tools.name: products_search
tools.description: Search CJ Dropshipping's product catalog. Supports keyword, category, warehouse/country, price range, inventory, sorting, and pagination.

productNameEn.description: English product keyword or title search.

countryCode.description: Warehouse or shipping country code when supported by the CJ endpoint, for example US.

startSellPrice.description: Minimum selling price filter, accepted by CJ Product List V2.

endSellPrice.description: Maximum selling price filter, accepted by CJ Product List V2.

minInventory.description: Minimum inventory filter when supported by CJ.

sortBy.description: CJ sort field, for example sellPrice or listedNum.

tools.name: product_get
tools.description: Fetch detailed product data from CJ by product ID, including images, descriptions, and variant references.

tools.name: product_variants_list
tools.description: List variants for a CJ product. Variants usually carry SKU/VID, option values, weight, and price information used for catalog import.

tools.name: variant_get
tools.description: Fetch one CJ variant by variant ID. Use when search results already include a VID and you need normalized variant details.

tools.name: inventory_get
tools.description: Check CJ inventory for one or more product variants. Use before importing or quoting sellable products.

tools.name: shipping_calculate
tools.description: Estimate CJ shipping for a product variant and destination. Useful for landed-cost previews before importing into Catalog.

countryCode.description: Destination country code, for example US.

tools.name: orders_create
tools.description: Create a CJ dropshipping order. Use after a local checkout/order flow has selected a CJ variant and collected shipping details.

shippingAddress.description: Destination address object accepted by CJ.

products.description: Order line items with CJ variant IDs and quantities.

tools.name: order_get
tools.description: Get a CJ order by order ID or order number to inspect fulfillment state and tracking information.
